creator: osa@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Xavier Beaudouin from comment #13)

In case of the update of www/nginx-devel please see my https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=277719#c12 comment.

Also, www/nginx-devel has been updated to 1.26.0 recently, so the patch may need to be rebased against new version.

Thank you.
